title: Eliminate socket-leak anti-pattern in helpers
prompt: The fixture test_fixtures/socket_leak_helpers.ex passes %Socket{} into three private helpers. Rewrite lib/my_app_web/live/report_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.ReportLive) so the helpers take only the data they need: fetch_report/2 becomes fetch_report/2 taking (org_id, date) returning the data list (assignment happens inline), format_header/2 takes (user, date), and chart_data/1 takes (raw_data). The render/1 must pass @current_user and @report_date or the derived values, not @socket.
tier_rationale: Multi-site refactor. Must understand intent and not over-pass. Sonnet sometimes keeps the socket in one helper.
